header.title: Date Difference Calculator — Calculate Days Between Dates Online
header.description: Free online date difference calculator to find the exact number of days, weeks, months, and years between two dates. Add or subtract time from any date, calculate business days, and measure date intervals instantly.
header.keywords: date difference calculator, days between dates, calculate days between two dates, date calculator, time between dates, date duration calculator, business days calculator, date math

selectDates: Select two dates to calculate the difference
enterBaseDate: Enter a base date and amount above
noteHolidays: Note: Does not account for public holidays

howToUse.title: How to Use Date Difference Calculator
howToUse.step1Desc: Choose the beginning date using the date picker or type it in manually.
howToUse.step2Desc: Pick the ending date to measure the difference between the two dates.
howToUse.step3Desc: See the difference in years, months, weeks, days, hours, minutes, and seconds with a full breakdown.
howToUse.step4Desc: Switch to the Add/Subtract tab to add or subtract time (days, weeks, months, years) from any date.

items.question: Does the calculation include both start and end dates?
items.answer: The calculator counts full 24-hour periods between dates. You can see both the total duration broken into years/months/days and the raw total days, hours, minutes, and seconds.

items.question: Can I calculate business days between dates?
items.answer: Yes, enable the Working Days toggle to exclude weekends (Saturday and Sunday) from the calculation. Note that public holidays are not automatically excluded.

items.question: How does the add/subtract feature work?
items.answer: Enter a base date, then specify an amount and unit (days, weeks, months, or years) to add or subtract. The result shows the new date instantly.

items.question: Does the calculator account for leap years?
items.answer: Yes, all date calculations automatically account for leap years, varying month lengths, and daylight saving time boundaries when calculating precise durations.

items.question: What are notable dates used for?
items.answer: Notable dates provide quick references to historically significant dates like Unix Epoch, Y2K, 9/11, iPhone Launch, and future New Years. Click any to load it instantly.

items.question: Can I use this tool to plan events or projects?
items.answer: Absolutely. Calculate the exact duration between two dates for project timelines, count down to events, or add/subtract time to schedule deadlines and milestones.
